title: Installed directory structure doesn't work
body:
I want to install verilator in a local directory so I'm not always dependent on the build tree being available and built. Unfortunately, the installed directory tree doesn't work.

I checked out master (06661ab6760cc619ebf029783785774d1cc6d216) and built with:

make distclean
autoconf
./configure --prefix /home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master --enable-longtests --disable-defenv
make -j 9
rm -r ~/.local/verilator
make install

When I try to compile a simple test case, I get this:
$ setenv VERILATOR_ROOT /home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master
$ $VERILATOR_ROOT/bin/verilator --timing -Mdir vlrobj_sz4/ --binary Test.v
%Error: Cannot find verilated_std.sv containing built-in std:: definitions:/home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv
%Error: This may be because there's no search path specified with -I<dir>.
        ... Looked in:
             /home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv
             /home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv.v
             /home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv.sv
             vlrobj_sz4///home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv
             vlrobj_sz4///home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv.v
             vlrobj_sz4///home/kcameron/.local/verilator/master/include/verilated_std.sv.sv
%Error: Exiting due to 2 error(s)
$ 

If I set VERILATOR_ROOT to the build dir, it works:
$ 
$ setenv VERILATOR_ROOT /home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator
$ $VERILATOR_ROOT/bin/verilator --timing -Mdir vlrobj_sz4/ --binary Test.v
make: Entering directory '/home/kcameron/projects/othello/verilog/bug3vlr/vlrobj_sz4'
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include -I/home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -Os -c -o verilated.o /home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include/verilated.cpp
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include -I/home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -Os -c -o verilated_threads.o /home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include/verilated_threads.cpp
/usr/bin/python3 /home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include VTest.cpp VTest___024root__DepSet_h755816ae__0.cpp VTest___024root__DepSet_h2d9f3804__0.cpp VTest__main.cpp VTest___024root__Slow.cpp VTest___024root__DepSet_h2d9f3804__0__Slow.cpp VTest__Syms.cpp > VTest__ALL.cpp
ccache g++  -I.  -MMD -I/home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include -I/home/kcameron/src/eda/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -DVM_TRACE_FST=0 -DVM_TRACE_VCD=0 -faligned-new -fcf-protection=none -Wno-bool-operation -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow     -DVL_TIME_CONTEXT   -Os -c -o VTest__ALL.o VTest__ALL.cpp
echo "" > VTest__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
Archive ar -rcs VTest__ALL.a VTest__ALL.o
g++    verilated.o verilated_threads.o VTest__ALL.a    -pthread -lpthread -latomic   -o VTest
rm VTest__ALL.verilator_deplist.tmp
make: Leaving directory '/home/kcameron/projects/othello/verilog/bug3vlr/vlrobj_sz4'
$

v5.006 has a similar issue but with verilator_bin
